design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate fire-filled environments and extinguish fires using water mechanics
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Managing fire spread and water supply while traversing hazardous levels
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Acting as a firefighter heroically battling infernos in escalating scenarios
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Theme-driven platformer with fire-fighting mechanics as core mechanic rather than cosmetic; specialized hazard-type gameplay focused on a specific occupation fantasy

world_building_techniques: Firefighter occupation as implicit narrative context

environmental_storytelling: Progressive fire intensity in level design

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor wiki entry
data_limitations: T3 tier source provides minimal mechanical documentation. Core gameplay loop inferred from title and theme only. Extensive details about difficulty systems, boss design, progression mechanics, and narrative delivery could not be verified from available source material.
